item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.2
Shruti 1.1.2 combines the 1.1.1 audio-safety correction with a clearer, roomier mixer.
- Widens the mixer so app names, levels, gain, output devices, and FX controls remain readable. - Moves latency and meter details onto a quiet secondary line instead of crowding app names. - Replaces long column labels with compact `LEVEL`, `GAIN`, and `OUTPUT` headings. - Makes Setup Assistant wider and shorter, with concise one-line explanations and inline status. - Gives Settings more horizontal room and clearly labels full internal testing access. - Preserves the permanent `arkaudiod` capture block and Safari/WebKit watchdog fix from 1.1.1. - Verified with 221 Shruti checks, 88 Sangam checks, and the ten-chain performance harness.
